g.text: your video editors at your service.
your growth strategists at your service.
your career agents at your service.
your legal officers at your service.
your product managers at your service.

svg.text: ten draft. ten review. one ships.
reads the task, convenes the team, returns the verdict

g.font-family: -apple-system, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', system-ui, sans-serif

g.text: with one line of what the board changed
one query in. twenty perspectives. one verdict out.
